race.comment: BEYZA SU (3) Career debut for trainer T O Kara. Jockey Vedat Abi̇ş is a strong choice aboard. Watch for a sign in the market. ÇEŞNIGIR (4) Debutant for trainer Hi̇Kmet Turan. Gains the services of jockey Seli̇M Kaya. Market as guide. TANKIZI (15) Career debut for trainer MüSlüM Dolak. Gains the services of MüSlüM çEli̇K. Betting as a guide. ARABIAN (2) Having first race start for Ferhat Altin. H Karataş is a suitable booking. Watch the market.
